ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Financial year the statement belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial statement belongs to */,
  "reporting_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, finalized, reviewed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes_in_equity" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in equity */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the change belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change in equity (e.g., issue of new shares, comprehensive income) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the change in equity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the change in equity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the change (e.g., internal, external audit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_in_equity_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_capital" (
  "share_capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share capital entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the share capital belongs to */,
  "called_up_share_capital" TEXT /* Called-up share capital */,
  "share_premium" TEXT /* Share premium */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the share capital entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the share capital entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the share capital entry was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the share capital entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_capital_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reserves" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reserve entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the reserve belongs to */,
  "reserve_type" TEXT /* Type of reserve (e.g., retained earnings, other equity) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reserve */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reserve entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reserve entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reserve entry was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reserve entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reserves_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_share_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee share scheme */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the scheme belongs to */,
  "scheme_type" TEXT /* Type of employee share scheme */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares issued under the scheme */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the employee share scheme entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the employee share scheme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the employee share scheme was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employee share scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_share_schemes_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comprehensive_income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comprehensive income entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the income belongs to */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of comprehensive income (e.g., profit after tax, total comprehensive income) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the comprehensive income */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comprehensive income entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the comprehensive income */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comprehensive income entry was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comprehensive income entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comprehensive_income_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_share_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new share issue */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the issue belongs to */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of new shares issued */,
  "issue_price" TEXT /* Price at which the new shares were issued */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the new share issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the new share issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the new share issue was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the new share issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_share_issues_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., GBP, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Pound Sterling, US Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the currency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the access period */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the access period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report output */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "output_file" TEXT /* File path to the output file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report output was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_outputs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
